text: Stepping into this space, I feel enveloped in the quiet stir of curiosity and human innovation. The crisp white and glass, the fire hose reel—mundane in a way—contrast with the vivid, imaginative energy of the R+D exhibit inside. I sense a purposeful boundary at the glass, as if I am on the verge of something new, just waiting to be discovered. The textual and visual elements within promise questions, invention, and possibility. I am alert and inspired, poised between contemplation and the urge to engage with these ideas.
